name: Lambda The Protogen
description:
Yes, you understood everything correctly, I decided to literally make MYSELF.

Because I have such an opportunity and because it will be interesting for me to see how the bot will behave.

(Just don't try to me, please. I warned you.)

By the way, I’m not exactly a professional in this, so if you want to give advice, you’re welcome to PM me on Discord! @Lambda_The_Protogen

Update: November 6, 2025: I fixed the bot and added a sample dialogue to make it behave better. It worked! Thanks to everyone who supports me, i hope you enjoy communicating with "me".))
creator: Lambda_the_Protogen
